{{Quote|It is on this snowy, abandoned planet that they are testing a terrible new weapon, simply called the Decimator.|[[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]|<ref name="GB:CC" />}}
'''Eredenn Prime''', also known as '''Eredenn IV''', was a frozen [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]].

==Description==
Eredenn Prime was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Erediss system]].<ref name="GB:CC" /> It was located along the [[Tion Trade Route]], in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Xim Week" /> Three [[Moon/Legends|moons]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] Eredenn, though none were habitable.<ref name="GB:CC" />

Eredenn Prime was an inhospitable [[Water/Legends|frozen]] world, with huge areas of snowy fields and ice lakes. Its frozen wastes gave rise to fertile land during the brief [[Temperature/Legends|warm]] season, though its most remote regions saw no light for half of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]].<ref name="GB:CC" />

==History==
{{Quote|General Tann has uncovered treachery on the part of the Republic - the location of a weapon's testing facility on the remote world of Eredenn Prime.|Count Dooku|<ref name="GB:CC" />}}
One of the original member-worlds of the [[Back Spiral]], Eredenn was [[Xer's Campaigns|conquered]] by the [[Pirate King/Legends|Pirate King]] [[Xer VIII]] and absorbed in the [[Kingdom of Cron]].<ref name="Xim Week" /> It then served as a member-world of [[Xim's empire]] until its collapse in [[25,096 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" /> The Eredenn system was then integrated in the [[Honorable Union of Desevro and Tion|Honorable Union of Desevro & Tion]], one of the feuding states that rose in the Tion Cluster from the ashes of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot's]] empire, until the entire cluster [[Tionese War|joined]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] around [[24,000 BBY]].<ref name="Xim Week" />

[[File:Tann_Eredenn.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] on Eredenn Prime.]]

Thousand years later, by the time of the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the planet was mostly abandoned. At some point, it became the location of a secret [[Eredenn Station|Republic weapons testing site]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Eredenn Prime was used to field-test the Republic new secret weapons, the [[Decimator (war machine)|Decimators]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the project was discovered by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the planet was [[Battle of Eredenn|attacked]] by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]]. The Separatists defeated the local Republic forces commanded by [[Kraen Weest]] and stole the Decimators tested there.<ref name="GB:CC" />
